sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Time Travel Minigame
special_mechanics.description: Mario surfs through a wide ocean collecting mushrooms to travel to different time periods. Collecting enough mushrooms transports Mario to the programmed time period and location.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented. Sources contain gameplay mechanics and development info but no movement parameter data. NES version emphasizes platforming more than other versions (MS-DOS, SNES). Mario cannot lose lives or take damage, making game over impossible. Control scheme adapted from Super Mario World platforming mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mario's Time Machine (NES)
